# Colorado Injury Counsel

> Colorado personal-injury acquisition site. All customer-facing pillar copy is DRAFT pending attorney review. The site is intentionally noindexed and password-gated.

## Architecture

- Problem pillars use /{problem}/ and explain a legal need or claim type.
- Audience pillars use /for/{audience}/ and orient a defined group to relevant problem and location resources.
- Location pillars use /{city}/{problem-lawyer}/ and connect local context to the corresponding problem hub.
- Legal figures appear only in the rendered LawContext component, not content JSON.
